description: Sector overlay for agricultural producers, importers, exporters, processors, aggregators, and agribusiness documentation in the UK.

metadata.scope: UK sector overlay controls for Agriculture. Intended to be used with uk_core_control_library.
metadata.source_note: Source basis is mapped from official UK legal/regulatory sources available at rule-pack publication time. This starter pack is not legal advice and requires expert validation before production reliance.
metadata.external_knowledge_policy: No external knowledge is introduced during document evaluation. Regulatory source mappings live only in this versioned rule pack.
metadata.territorial_scope_note: UK law can differ across England, Wales, Scotland, and Northern Ireland. This starter pack uses UK-wide sources where available and flags devolved or nation-specific application for human review.

primary_sources.name: Import plants and plant products to Great Britain guidance
Moving specified plants, plant pests, pathogens and soil
Environmental permitting and rural regulation guidance

rules.title: Plant-health import or phytosanitary evidence is present where applicable
rules.summary: Checks for APHA, IPAFFS, phytosanitary certificate, plant-health import notification, or professional-operator evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified UK compliance/legal reviewer must confirm applicability, legal sufficiency, territorial scope, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.

rules.title: Food safety and HACCP evidence is present where food/feed operations are in scope
rules.summary: Checks for HACCP, food safety management, hygiene training, allergen controls, or traceability evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified UK compliance/legal reviewer must confirm applicability, legal sufficiency, territorial scope, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.
source_basis: Food Standards Agency food hygiene guidance

rules.title: Environmental permit, waste, or pollution-control evidence is present where applicable
rules.summary: Checks for environmental permitting, waste management, nutrient management, effluent, or pollution-prevention evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified UK compliance/legal reviewer must confirm applicability, legal sufficiency, territorial scope, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.
source_basis: Environment Agency / DEFRA environmental permitting framework

rules.title: Animal health, welfare, or movement control evidence is present where applicable
rules.summary: Checks for animal movement, disease control, welfare, veterinary inspection, or APHA evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified UK compliance/legal reviewer must confirm applicability, legal sufficiency, territorial scope, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.
source_basis: DEFRA/APHA animal health and welfare framework

rules.title: No unsupported safety or certification claim is present
rules.summary: Screens for wording suggesting food, organic, safety, or welfare certification without supporting evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified UK compliance/legal reviewer must confirm applicability, legal sufficiency, territorial scope, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.
source_basis: Consumer protection and food information principles
